Politics.headline: White House scrambles for gas-price relief as Iran war drags on
Politics.detail: With prices up 50% since the start of the war with Iran, officials in President Trump's administration are considering suspending the federal gas tax to provide visible consumer relief as hopes fade for a quick resolution. This move would reduce motor fuel prices by 18 cents a gallon.

Politics.headline: Britain's Health Secretary Streeting resigns as pressure on Starmer grows
Politics.detail: Britain's Health Secretary, Streeting, has resigned amidst growing pressure on PM Starmer, alongside another Labour lawmaker who resigned his seat in parliament. This creates an opportunity for a challenger to PM Starmer.

Politics.headline: Supreme Court upholds mail access to abortion pill mifepristone for now
Politics.detail: The Supreme Court has maintained mail access to the abortion pill mifepristone, setting aside a lower court order that had blocked abortion providers from prescribing the drug through telehealth and shipping it to patients. Access is likely to remain uninterrupted at least until next year as the lawsuit plays out.

Politics.headline: Trump and Xi hail 'most important' relationship
Politics.detail: U.S. President Donald Trump described his country's relationship with China as 'one of the most consequential'. This comes as Trump and Xi Jinping visit the Temple of Heaven in Beijing and hold a welcoming banquet.

Politics.headline: Lacson on Senate chaos: He who has means, opportunity and motive is probable suspect
Politics.detail: Philippine Senator Ronald Dela Rosa's whereabouts are unknown after he left his senate refuge and evaded arrest by NBI agents. Philippine Senate President Alan Cayetano schedules the convening of an impeachment court for the vice president's trial on May 18.

Finance & Economy.headline: Wall Street hits fresh highs after Beijing talks
Finance & Economy.detail: Technology shares led gains while materials stocks recorded the steepest declines after recent inflation reports dampened expectations for near-term interest rate cuts from the US Federal Reserve.

Finance & Economy.headline: Xi-Trump Summit Balances Trade, AI Chips, and Taiwan Risks
Finance & Economy.detail: The IMF welcomes lower US-China tensions amid global risks and continues to discuss possible financial assistance for member countries that are struggling with higher energy and commodity costs due to the Middle East conflict.

Finance & Economy.headline: Korea gradually feeling impact of prolonged Middle East crisis: Finance minister
Finance & Economy.detail: Finance Minister Koo Yun-cheol said that Korea is gradually feeling the impact of the prolonged conflict in the Middle East through higher consumer prices despite strong export data and vowed proactive steps to stabilize supply chains.

Finance & Economy.headline: Westport Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
Finance & Economy.detail: Westport Fuel Systems Inc. reported a 33% increase in revenue from its Cespira joint venture with Volvo Group, driven by strong demand for LNG HPDI trucks.

Finance & Economy.headline: Officials say $1.3 billion in Medicaid money to California will be deferred over suspicions of fraud.
Finance & Economy.detail: Officials have announced that $1.3 billion in Medicaid funds allocated for California are being put on hold due to concerns regarding potential fraudulent activities.

Technology.headline: OpenAI Tells Mac Users to Update Apps After Software Supply Chain Attack
Technology.detail: OpenAI was hit by a supply chain attack involving hackers publishing a malicious version of Tanstack software used for web development, prompting them to urge Mac users to update their apps.

Technology.headline: Lawyers for Elon Musk and OpenAI make their final case in a trial that could shape AI's future
Technology.detail: Lawyers for Elon Musk and OpenAI made their final arguments Thursday in the landmark trial whose outcome could shape the future of artificial intelligence.

Technology.headline: AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon join forces to eliminate mobile coverage dead zones
Technology.detail: The rival carriers will pool resources to improve satellite capacity and boost connectivity in underserved areas.

Technology.headline: Amazon Leo aims to double its pace as it gets set to roll out its satellite broadband network
Technology.detail: One year after the start of its launch campaign, Amazon Leo is a 'couple of months' away from kicking off commercial service, VP says.

Technology.headline: Instagram launches Snapchat-like 'Instants' feature for disappearing photo sharing
Technology.detail: Instagram has launched a new 'Instants' feature, similar to Snapchat, for sharing photos that disappear.

Science.headline: Viagra could hold key to halting Peyronie's disease
Science.detail: Research suggests Viagra may offer a potential treatment for Peyronie's disease, a condition causing painful curvature of the penis. Further studies are needed to confirm these findings.

Science.headline: Hairy new fish species discovered in the Great Barrier Reef
Science.detail: A new species of fish, characterized by its unusual 'hairy' appearance, has been identified in the Great Barrier Reef. The discovery highlights the biodiversity still hidden within this fragile ecosystem.

Science.headline: Most Australia's 'Wild Dogs' Are Actually Dingoes, DNA Study Finds
Science.detail: A recent DNA study revealed that the majority of Australia's 'wild dogs' are actually dingoes, challenging previous classifications and impacting conservation efforts. This finding has implications for managing the species and its role in the ecosystem.

Science.headline: Giant New Dinosaur Species Discovered in Thailand Reveals Hidden Diversity of Asian Titans
Science.detail: Paleontologists have unearthed a new giant dinosaur species in Thailand, shedding light on the previously underestimated diversity of titanosaurs in Asia. The discovery contributes to our understanding of dinosaur evolution and distribution.

Science.headline: Water drops on soap bubble films act like merging galaxies
Science.detail: Water droplets on soap films orbited and merged like colliding galaxies, a technique that could help scientists study the cosmos. This novel approach offers a new way to simulate and understand galactic mergers.

Health.headline: The Rise of Pan-RAS Inhibitors in Pancreatic Cancer
Health.detail: Dr. Emil Lou breaks down pivotal AACR 2026 data on pan-RAS inhibitors and the shift toward first-line precision oncology in pancreatic cancer.

Health.headline: Ultra-processed foods tied to nearly fourfold asthma risk in children
Health.detail: A recent study has found a link between the consumption of ultra-processed foods and a nearly fourfold increased risk of asthma in children.

Health.headline: License To Deliver: Some Midwives Break the Law To Assist With Home Births
Health.detail: Some midwives are breaking the law to assist with home births.

Health.headline: Trump Demands Medicaid Data for Deportation. Some States Go a Step Further.
Health.detail: Several states have required their health agencies to verify immigration status among Medicaid recipients and report them to the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, with North Carolina being the latest to pass such a law.

Health.headline: Eugene Braunwald's Legacy Shaped Modern Cardiology
Health.detail: A pioneer of modern cardiology, Eugene Braunwald helped transform heart care through groundbreaking research, shaping how myocardial infarction and cardiovascular disease are treated today.

Sports.headline: FIFA Announces Super Bowl-Style World Cup Final Halftime Show Featuring Madonna, Shakira and BTS
Sports.detail: The World Cup final halftime show will feature Madonna, Shakira, and BTS. The announcement has generated significant buzz and anticipation for the event.

Sports.headline: Patriots-Seahawks Super Bowl rematch will kick off 2026 season
Sports.detail: The New England Patriots and Seattle Seahawks will face off in a Super Bowl rematch to start the 2026 NFL season. This highly anticipated game is generating excitement among fans of both teams.

Sports.headline: NSW survive nail-biting finish to claim second straight series
Sports.detail: New South Wales (NSW) emerged victorious in a closely contested match to secure their second consecutive series win. The match was filled with drama and excitement, keeping fans on the edge of their seats.

Sports.headline: Jake Paul claims Canelo Alvarez has responded to $200M fight offer
Sports.detail: Jake Paul claims that Canelo Alvarez has responded to his 200 million dollar fight offer. The potential matchup has stirred debate among boxing fans and sports enthusiasts alike.

Sports.headline: James Harden, still learning new role, helps Cleveland get 1 win away from East finals
Sports.detail: James Harden's ongoing adaptation to his new role is proving beneficial for Cleveland, bringing them closer to the Eastern Conference finals. His performance is crucial as the team aims for a strong playoff run.

Entertainment.headline: Madonna, Shakira, BTS to headline World Cup final's 1st halftime show
Entertainment.detail: The FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on July 19 will include a Super Bowl-style performance with Madonna, Shakira, and K-pop group BTS, curated by Coldplay's Chris Martin. The show will support the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund, which is raising $100 million to help children access education.

Entertainment.headline: Mario Ho highlights 'Sports Plus' vision at Asian IR Expo summit
Entertainment.detail: Mario Ho, a co-owner of the Boston Celtics, called for Macau to position itself as a leading sports and entertainment hub in the Asia-Pacific region, envisioning integrated resorts evolving into platforms that combine sports arenas, esports studios, cultural spaces and innovation hubs. He emphasized the need for diversification beyond traditional gaming and the importance of technology such as AI, VR and AR in transforming sports and fan engagement.

Entertainment.headline: Shakira and Burna Boy release official 2026 FIFA World Cup Anthem, 'Dai Dai'
Entertainment.detail: Shakira and Burna Boy have teamed up for “Dai Dai,” the official song for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, a multilingual pop track that blends Afrobeats and Latin rhythms, mentioning famous soccer players and countries competing. The song's release coincides with the announcement that Shakira, Madonna and BTS will headline the tournament's first-ever final halftime show.

Entertainment.headline: Britney Spears Turns Heads at L.A. Restaurant
Entertainment.detail: Britney Spears was spotted at an L.A. restaurant, drawing attention. Further details about the event or her activities were not specified in the provided context.

Entertainment.headline: Tiger Woods Returns to US After Rehab Stint in Zurich Amid DUI Case
Entertainment.detail: Tiger Woods has returned to the US following a rehab stint in Zurich amidst his DUI case. This marks his first public appearance stepping off a plane since completing the rehab program.

Crime & Justice.headline: Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions overturned by South Carolina supreme court
Crime & Justice.detail: The South Carolina Supreme Court overturned the murder convictions against Alex Murdaugh and ordered a new trial, questioning 'improper' conduct by the county clerk.

Crime & Justice.headline: Kouri Richins sentenced in husband's fentanyl-laced cocktail murder
Crime & Justice.detail: Kouri Richins, who wrote a children's book on grief after her husband's death, was sentenced to life without the possibility of parole after being convicted of poisoning her husband with fentanyl.

Crime & Justice.headline: Former death row inmate granted bond after nearly being executed 3 times
Crime & Justice.detail: An Oklahoma judge granted bond to former death row inmate Richard Glossip, potentially leading to his release from prison while awaiting a new trial for a 1997 killing.

Crime & Justice.headline: Georgia safety Ja'Marley Riddle arrested on drug, speeding charges
Crime & Justice.detail: Georgia safety Ja'Marley Riddle was arrested and is facing charges related to drugs and speeding.

Crime & Justice.headline: Louisiana police to pay $4.85m to daughter of Black motorist who died at officers' hands in 2019
Crime & Justice.detail: Police and sheriff's office agree to settlement after Ronald Greene was fatally shocked and punched during 2019 arrest.

Education.headline: U.S. Department of Education Announces Grant Competition to Empower States Through a Reimagined Comprehensive Centers Program
Education.detail: The U.S. Department of Education (ED) issued the Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 competition for the Comprehensive Centers Program, reaffirming the commitment to return education to the states.

Education.headline: U.S. Department of Education and Health and Human Services issue Fiscal Year 2026 competitions for Ready to Learn Program and Promise Neighborhoods Program
Education.detail: The U.S. Departments of Education and Health and Human Services issued the Fiscal Year 2026 competitions for the Ready to Learn Program and the Promise Neighborhoods Program.

Education.headline: U.S. Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights Opens Investigation into Houston Independent School District
Education.detail: The U.S. Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights opened an investigation into the Houston Independent School District in Houston.

Education.headline: Texas school districts face first deadline from law requiring seat belts on buses
Education.detail: Texas school districts are facing their first deadline from a law that requires seat belts on buses.

Education.headline: School cellphone bans don't affect test scores or attendance, study finds
Education.detail: A recent study has found that school cellphone bans do not have an impact on test scores or student attendance.

Lifestyle.headline: KPop Demon Hunters world tour officially happening
Lifestyle.detail: Streaming platform Netflix and live entertainment company AEG Presents announced on Thursday (May 14) that they're collaborating on a KPop Demon Hunters concert world tour.

Lifestyle.headline: Bar Kap opens at the House of Tan Yeok Nee with cocktails inspired by its storied past
Lifestyle.detail: In one of Singapore's most atmospheric heritage mansions, Bar Kap brings together clay-aged cocktails, Teochew-inspired details and intimate private rooms in a bar experience rooted in place.

Lifestyle.headline: Jonathan Anderson presents a cinematic first cruise collection for Dior
Lifestyle.detail: Jonathan Anderson presented his first cruise collection for Dior.

Lifestyle.headline: Mschf designs kit, capsule for OTB-backed soccer club L.R. Vicenza
Lifestyle.detail: Mschf designs kit and capsule for OTB-backed soccer club L.R. Vicenza.

Lifestyle.headline: Demi Moore bends the Cannes dress rules in Gucci
Lifestyle.detail: Demi Moore bends the Cannes dress rules in Gucci.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Education is (in)formative
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author regrets missing the Senate discussion on the proposed drastic reduction in the college general education (GE) curriculum and believes that philosophy, history, and the humanities are informative and necessary for education.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Letters to The Editor — May 15, 2026
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The letters discuss various topics, including the selection of the Chief Minister of Kerala and the importance of leadership opportunities for individuals with capability, vision, and intellect.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: New vision for stable, constructive ties
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The summit between the leaders of the world's two largest economies is expected to inject stability into the world, as both sides agreed to build a constructive relationship of strategic stability, with a goal to make 2026 a historic year for US-China relations.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: KMT undermines Taiwan's UAV push
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Legislative Yuan, dominated by opposition parties, cut the government's special defense budget, dealing a blow to national defense and the domestic uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV) industry, despite Taiwan's drone exports surging past US$100 million in the first quarter of this year.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL - Gunfire at the Senate corral
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An editorial discussing gunfire at the Senate, remarking that no one was reported injured on Wednesday night at the Senate, where Sen. Ronald dela Rosa was under the so-called protective custody of his allies in the new majority.

World.headline: Xi warns Trump of 'clashes and even conflicts' with US over Taiwan
World.detail: During a meeting in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping warned President Trump that mishandling the Taiwan issue could lead to conflicts between the two nations. The leaders are aiming to stabilize their trading relationship after last year's trade war.

World.headline: Israel To Sue New York Times Over Article On Rape Of Palestinian Detainees
World.detail: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu announced that Israel will sue The New York Times over an article concerning the rape of Palestinian prisoners. This decision follows the publication of an article that Israel claims contains false allegations of sexual abuse.

World.headline: Lebanon, Israel Hold New Peace Talks In US As Ceasefire Nears End
World.detail: Lebanon and Israel have engaged in new peace talks in the U.S. as the current ceasefire nears its conclusion. These discussions aim to address ongoing tensions and explore potential pathways towards a more stable and lasting resolution.

World.headline: Trump Says China Agreed To Buy 200 Boeing Jets
World.detail: President Trump stated that China has agreed to purchase 200 Boeing jets following discussions with Chinese leaders. This agreement was highlighted as a positive outcome of the ongoing trade talks between the United States and China.

World.headline: Cuba's Diaz-Canel open to US aid amid worsening fuel crisis, blackouts
World.detail: Cuban President Miguel Diaz-Canel has indicated openness to receiving aid from the United States amidst a worsening fuel crisis and widespread blackouts on the island. The country faces severe shortages, leading to consideration of international assistance.

Zimbabwe.headline: Manicaland endorses leadership continuity to 2030
Zimbabwe.detail: ZANU PF has concluded its final round of grassroots consultations on Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3 across Chimanimani, Buhera, Chipinge, and Mutasa, with party structures endorsing leadership continuity to 2030.

Zimbabwe.headline: Energy revolution transforms Nzvimbe
Zimbabwe.detail: A state-of-the-art solar mini-grid was switched on in Nzvimbe, a rural area in Manicaland, by the government, in a landmark intervention.

Zimbabwe.headline: Nyaradzo Buys Glen Forest Cemetery, Plans Luxury-Style Memorial Park In Harare
Zimbabwe.detail: Nyaradzo Group has acquired Glen Forest Cemetery and intends to develop it into a luxury-style memorial park in Harare.

Zimbabwe.headline: Foreign Businessman Killed In Front Of His Family By Employee In Bulawayo
Zimbabwe.detail: A foreign businessman was murdered in Bulawayo in front of his family by an employee.

Zimbabwe.headline: Teenage Hadebe's Staggering US Salary Makes Him One Of Zimbabwe's Best-Paid Players
Zimbabwe.detail: Teenage Hadebe's substantial US salary positions him as one of the highest-paid Zimbabwean athletes.
